title: deprea pilosa
intro: Deprea pilosa, also known as the hairy nightshade or false nightshade, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. Deprea pilosa can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
